description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The house is set back from the street with a driveway and sidewalk, and is surrounded by a few trees and minimal landscaping. The main entryway is prominent, with a wide glass door and a small set of steps leading up from the sidewalk. The rear of the house includes a partially enclosed patio or sunroom with a darker roof section. The overall color palette is neutral, with white and gray walls, black window frames, and a dark brown roof accent.
description: A modern, single-story house with large windows, flat roof, and minimalist landscaping. The design emphasizes clean lines and open, light-filled spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, large windows, a red car parked on the street, and trees flanking the sidewalk.
description_view_1: Side/rear view reveals the driveway, backyard area, and a partially enclosed patio or sunroom with a dark roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the patio/sunroom, large glass doors, and a tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view displays the driveway, side windows, and the transition between the main house and the patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide glass door with steps, minimal overhang, and no porch or columns
